_comment: Starry Sky (星空) dimension type — the inter-planetary void of the Alliance Star System. Canon: Wang Lin and Situ Nan traveled through this space after leaving Planet Suzaku. Cultivators fly through it (higher realms fly in vacuum; lower realms use teleportation arrays). Has skylight (distant stars), no ceiling, no natural day/night (fixed at midnight for the eternal starfield). Bed does not work (no surface to anchor on). No raids (the void is empty of civilization). Piglins do not spawn (no nether affiliation). Monsters cannot spawn — the void is hostile but empty; dangers come from void beasts, not vanilla mobs. ambient_light=0.0 for full darkness. fixed_time=18000 (midnight — the eternal starfield). effects=the_end for dark sky + void fog. min_y=-64, height=384 (expanded void space). logical_height=384 to allow full vertical cultivator flight.
